od_description: Sadrebal ↔ Gulab Bagh via Nowshera (N/NE Srinagar). Part of the NE-Srinagar local cluster.
stops_verdict: Stops along the NE line present but corridor support is thin (2 drivers).
narrative: Sadrebal ↔ Gulab Bagh via Nowshera — the NE-Srinagar local cluster again (with C2/C9/C11). FDR-144 'Srinagar to Gulabagh' matches the Gulab Bagh endpoint but only 0.34 overlap; the Rangpora routes are 0.46 but wrong O–D. THIN support (5 runs / 2 drivers / 3 days). Consistent with the under-permitted NE-Srinagar local network; not asserted strongly on 2 drivers.
evidence_used: geocoded endpoints: Sadrebal (A), Gulab Bagh (B), Nowshera (mid)
FDR-144 'Srinagar to Gulabagh' = endpoint match but 0.34 overlap; no clean match
data_quality_flags: reinforces the NE-Srinagar under-permitted local cluster
implied_headway 216 min is a partial-adoption artifact
CORRECTED: not informal/under-permitted; observed geometry diverges from rationalised route (see correction field)
correction_raw_permit_check: RAW-PERMIT CHECK (2026-07-02): the places on this corridor ARE in the raw permit system (e.g. Lalbazar 26 / Soura 83 / Gulabagh 2 / Budgam 42 / Pampore 40 permit endpoints; smaller mahallas are traversed, named for major endpoints). Retracting any 'under-permitted/informal' reading — the ≤0.40 overlap is with the engine's RATIONALISED geometry, so this is a DIVERGENCE between the rationalised route geometry and observed reality (engine to reconcile), NOT an informal route.
